title: Crispy Peruvian Vine Leaves Wrap
description: A crunchy, hangovercure Peruvian wrap featuring vine leaves, quinoa, chickpeas, and a spiced chickpea flour coating, finished in an air fryer for a crisp finish.
instructions: Lay a vine leaf flat on a clean surface and brush lightly with olive oil.
In a bowl, mix quinoa, chickpeas, ground cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, lemon juice, and crushed almonds.
Spoon a generous amount of the filling onto the center of the leaf, then fold the sides over and roll tightly, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Heat the air fryer to 200°C (400°F). Place the wraps in the basket in a single layer, ensuring they are not touching.
Lightly spray or brush the tops with a small amount of olive oil to aid crisping.
Air‑fry for 10–12 minutes, turning halfway through, until the vine leaves are crisp and the coating is golden.
Remove from the air fryer, let cool for 2 minutes, then slice each wrap into bite‑sized pieces.
Serve immediately, optionally with a side of fresh cilantro‑lime salsa for extra refreshment.
